# name

**Instance Property**

A descriptive name for the material.

## Declaration

```swift
var name: String { get set }
```

## Discussion

This name isn’t used in rendering, but it can be useful for debugging and organizing the materials used in a project. When you load materials from an asset file with the [doc://com.apple.modelio/documentation/ModelIO/MDLAsset] class, Model I/O uses names assigned in the asset file where supported by the file format.

## Using a material

- **materialFace**: The surface of an object.
